hero.title: Know Your Life at a Glance
hero.subtitle: Liferadar is your personal life-management radar — helping you track, evaluate, and improve every important dimension of your life.

what.title: What is Liferadar?
what.lead: Life is multidimensional. Work, health, relationships, faith, finances — each area deserves conscious attention.
what.body1: Liferadar gives you a structured, visual framework to define the pillars that matter most to you, score them regularly, and turn your reflections into concrete decisions.
what.body2: Whether you're an individual striving for balance or a family admin coordinating growth across your household, Liferadar adapts to your needs.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to live intentionally.

pillars.title: Life Pillars
pillars.desc: Define the domains that shape your life — career, health, family, spirituality, and more — and organise them into pillars, sub-pillars, and items.

evaluations.title: Life Evaluations
evaluations.desc: Score any item on a 1–5 scale, add notes, and set reminders. Your 30-day history is visualised in a compact daily-average matrix.

actionItems.title: Action Items
actionItems.desc: Every evaluation can spawn concrete action items (decisions). Track their status and due dates in a dedicated Action Items view.

expenseControl.title: Expense Control
expenseControl.desc: Track recurring bills and subscriptions with monthly and yearly views, payment status, and renewal reminders so spending stays under control.

family.title: Family Mode
family.desc: A Family Admin can manage multiple members under one account. Each member has their own private pillars while the admin keeps the overview.

trips.title: Trip Planner
trips.desc: Plan family or personal trips with step-by-step itineraries. Keep travel memories and plans all in one place.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.desc: Full support for English, Arabic, and French — including right-to-left layouts for Arabic — so you reflect in the language closest to your heart.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to a more intentional life.

define.title: Define Your Pillars
define.desc: Start by identifying the life areas that matter most to you. Add sub-pillars and items to be as granular as you need.

evaluate.title: Evaluate Regularly
evaluate.desc: Periodically score each item, add notes, and log how you feel. Consistency is the key to meaningful insights.

decide.title: Create Decisions
decide.desc: For any evaluation that needs follow-up, create an action item with a description and due date and track it to completion.

grow.title: Review & Grow
grow.desc: Your 30-day score matrix shows trends at a glance. Use them to celebrate progress and spot areas that need more attention.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.desc: Track your personal growth across career, health, spirituality, hobbies, and more.

families.title: Families
families.desc: A family admin can monitor the progress of all members and keep everyone on track together.

teams.title: Global Users
teams.desc: Full multilingual support — English, Arabic, and French — so you can reflect in the language closest to your heart.

brand.tagline: We build purposeful digital products that help people live and work better.
